=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Initializes the VIC-II video chip settings for the game. ; Clears sprite coordinates, enables multi-color mode for character display, ; sets up global border and background colors, and configures sprite sizes, ; priorities, and multi-color settings. Also sets the character memory pointer. ; ; Inputs: None ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies VIC-II registers ($D000-$D026) and Sprite 0 pointer ($07F8) ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- init_vic_video ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1803 txa b1003 sta $d000,x ; Clear sprite coordinates ($D000-$D010) ; x-ref: $1009; Sprite 0 X Pos inx cpx #$11 bne b1003 sta $d017 ; Sprites Expand 2x Vertical (Y) sta $d01b ; Sprite to Background Display Priority sta $d01d ; Sprites Expand 2x Horizontal (X) lda #$ff sta $d015 ; Sprite display Enable sta $d01c ; Sprites Multi-Color Mode Select lda #$00 sta $d020 ; Border Color lda #$0b sta $d021 ; Background Color 0 lda #$00 sta $d022 ; Background Color 1, Multi-Color Register 0 lda #$06 sta $d023 ; Background Color 2, Multi-Color Register 1 lda #$00 sta $d025 ; Sprite Multi-Color Register 0 lda #$02 sta $d026 ; Sprite Multi-Color Register 1 lda $d016 ; VIC Control Register 2 ora #$10 sta $d016 ; VIC Control Register 2 lda $d018 ; VIC Memory Control Register and #$f0 ora #$08 ; Set character memory to $2000 sta $d018 ; VIC Memory Control Register lda #$c0 sta sprite_ptr_0 ; Sprite 0 pointer points to $3000 rts ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Initializes the screen display, background colors, and title/game sprites. ; This routine runs at startup to paint the initial screen layout to Screen RAM ; ($0400) and Color RAM ($D800). It establishes the sprite positions and does a ; fade-in effect by shifting bits into the sprite enable register ($D015) before ; switching to a second screen layout ($2800). ; ; Inputs: None ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies Screen RAM ($0400), Color RAM ($D800), and all Sprite ; registers in ($D000-$D015). Loops through wait delays. ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- init_screen_and_sprites ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1806 b1054 lda f2400,x ; Copy layout 1 ($2400) to Screen RAM ($0400) ; x-ref: $106d sta f0400,x lda f2500,x sta f0500,x lda f2600,x sta f0600,x lda f26F0,x sta f06F0,x inx bne b1054 ldx #$00 b1071 lda #$04 ; x-ref: $109f sta fD800,x ; Color Memory ($D800) Setup lda #$0f sta fD850,x sta fD878,x lda #$03 sta fD8C8,x sta fD940,x sta fD9B8,x sta fDA30,x lda #$01 sta fDAA8,x sta fDAF8,x sta fDB48,x lda #$04 sta fDB98,x inx cpx #$50 bne b1071 lda #$00 jsr s11CA lda #$38 sta $d000 ; Setup Sprites 0-7 X/Y Coordinates; Sprite 0 X Pos sta $d002 ; Sprite 1 X Pos sta $d004 ; Sprite 2 X Pos sta $d006 ; Sprite 3 X Pos lda #$d0 sta $d008 ; Sprite 4 X Pos sta $d00a ; Sprite 5 X Pos sta $d00c ; Sprite 6 X Pos sta $d00e ; Sprite 7 X Pos lda #$5a sta $d001 ; Sprite 0 Y Pos sta $d009 ; Sprite 4 Y Pos lda #$72 sta $d003 ; Sprite 1 Y Pos sta $d00b ; Sprite 5 Y Pos lda #$8a sta $d005 ; Sprite 2 Y Pos sta $d00d ; Sprite 6 Y Pos lda #$a2 sta $d007 ; Sprite 3 Y Pos sta $d00f ; Sprite 7 Y Pos lda #$c2 sta sprite_ptr_0 ; Setup Sprites 0-7 Pointers lda #$c4 sta sprite_ptr_1 lda #$c6 sta sprite_ptr_2 lda #$c8 sta sprite_ptr_3 lda #$ca sta sprite_ptr_4 lda #$cc sta a07FD lda #$ce sta a07FE lda #$d0 jsr s1164 j110A jsr s11D0 ; x-ref: $1117 lda $d015 ; Sprite display Enable asl a ; Slide/Fade in Sprite Enable bits clc adc #$01 sta $d015 ; Sprite display Enable jmp j110A j111A ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $11eb lda #$20 b111E sta f04D0,x ; x-ref: $112b sta f0500,x sta f0600,x sta f06A0,x inx bne b111E init_title_screen ldx #$00 b112F lda instructions_screen_1,x ; Copy layout 2 ($2800) to Screen RAM ($0400) ; x-ref: $1158 sta f0400,x lda instructions_screen_2,x sta f0500,x lda instructions_screen_3,x sta f0600,x lda instructions_screen_4,x sta f06F0,x lda #$00 sta $d015 ; Sprite display Enable lda #$07 sta fD8F0,x sta fD9F0,x sta fDAC0,x inx bne b112F b115A lda #$10 ; x-ref: $115f jmp title_screen_menu bne b115A jmp j118E s1164 sta a07FF ; x-ref: $1107 lda #$01 sta $d027 ; Sprite 0 Color sta $d028 ; Sprite 1 Color lda #$07 sta $d02a ; Sprite 3 Color lda #$0e sta $d02b ; Sprite 4 Color lda #$0e sta $d02c ; Sprite 5 Color lda #$04 sta $d029 ; Sprite 2 Color lda #$05 sta $d02d ; Sprite 6 Color lda #$0d sta $d02e ; Sprite 7 Color rts j118E jsr init_game_vars ; x-ref: $1161, $3fea, $3ff7 jsr s170C rts ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Initializes the game state, memory buffers, and SID audio filters. ; This routine sets up several 256-byte pages ($0800-$0DFF), clears object/sprite ; buffers, and resets various variables at the start of $0800. It also initializes ; the SID chip's filter and volume settings initially calling `$1195` then jumping ; to `$1200` to complete the rest of the work. ; ; Inputs: None ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies memory regions $0800-$0DFF, $0F50-$0F56, $7400-$7457, ; and SID registers $D415-$D418. ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- init_game_state ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1800 txa b1198 sta hi_score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $119e inx cpx #$07 bne b1198 lda #$4f sta $d418 ; SID Mode/Volume; Select Filter Mode and Volume ldx #$00 b11A7 lda #$20 ; x-ref: $11b4 sta f7430,x lda #$00 sta f7400,x inx cpx #$28 bne b11A7 lda #$06 sta $d417 ; SID Resonance/Voice Input; Filter Resonance Control / Voice Input Control jmp init_game_vars .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $8d s11CA sta $d015 ; x-ref: $10a3; Sprite display Enable jmp update_hud_display s11D0 ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $110a b11D2 ldy #$00 ; x-ref: $11df b11D4 lda #$10 ; x-ref: $11dc bit @w joy_state beq b11E2 dey bne b11D4 dex bne b11D2 rts b11E2 lda #$10 ; x-ref: $11d9, $11e7 bit @w joy_state beq b11E2 pla pla jmp j111A .byte $00, $00 init_hud_and_scroll_screen_down jsr init_hud ; x-ref: $1300 jsr scroll_screen_down rts .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Initializes game variables and duplicates memory pages. ; This routine resets various state variables in the $0800-$09FF range, zeroes ; out specific arrays, and then creates two copies of the $0800-$09FF memory pages ; at $0A00-$0BFF and $0C00-$0DFF. It finally resets the SID filter cutoff frequency. ; ; Inputs: None ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies memory $0800-$0DFF, $7080-$7082, and SID $D415-$D416. ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- level_nr_self_modifiying =*+$01 init_game_vars lda #$00 ; x-ref: $118e, $11bb sta level_nr lda #$00 sta level_block_idx lda #24 sta level_tile_y_offset lda #$00 sta season_nr lda #$80 sta player_speed lda #$00 tax ; Clear $0820-$084E b121C sta crashed_cars_tens,x ; x-ref: $1222 inx cpx #$2f bne b121C lda #$00 sta crashed_cars_ones lda #$03 sta lives_ones lda #$00 sta player_is_jumping lda #$50 sta player_speed lda #$00 sta a08E0 sta a08E2 lda #$08 sta a08E1 lda #$00 sta a0807 sta a0808 lda #$00 sta pickup_mode_active sta scroll_row_snapshot sta dist_substep ldx #$00 b125A lda level_nr,x ; Copy $0800-$08FF to $0A00 and $0C00 ; x-ref: $126d sta f0A00,x sta f0C00,x lda f0900,x ; Copy $0900-$09FF to $0B00 and $0D00 sta f0B00,x sta f0D00,x inx bne b125A lda #$00 sta $d415 ; Filter Cutoff Frequency: Low-Nybble lda #$00 sta $d416 ; Filter Cutoff Frequency: High-Byte sta sfx_voice_1_state sta sfx_voice_1_freq_lo sta sfx_voice_1_freq_mod rts .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; MAIN ENTRY POINT ; This code was in the tape loader. ; Moved to the "main" binary to have a single-load game boot sei lda #>irq_handler_music sta a0315 ; IRQ lda #level_tile_tbl sta p_tmp_hi j1311 cpx #$00 ; x-ref: $1323 beq b1326 lda p_tmp_lo clc adc #$20 sta p_tmp_lo lda p_tmp_hi adc #$00 sta p_tmp_hi dex jmp j1311 b1326 lda (p_tmp_lo),y ; x-ref: $1313 tax lda #level_tile_definition_tbl sta p_tmp_hi j1331 dex ; x-ref: $133d cpx #$00 beq b1340 lda p_tmp_hi clc adc #$04 sta p_tmp_hi jmp j1331 b1340 ldx level_tile_y_offset ; x-ref: $1334 j1343 cpx #$00 ; x-ref: $1355 beq b1358 lda p_tmp_lo clc adc #$28 sta p_tmp_lo lda p_tmp_hi adc #$00 sta p_tmp_hi dex jmp j1343 b1358 ldy #$00 ; x-ref: $1345 b135A lda (p_tmp_lo),y ; x-ref: $136b sta f0428,y ldx season_nr lda tbl_text_color_seasons,x sta fD828,y iny cpy #$28 bne b135A dec level_tile_y_offset bmi b1373 rts b1373 lda #24 ; x-ref: $1370 sta level_tile_y_offset inc level_block_idx lda level_block_idx cmp #$20 beq b1383 rts b1383 nop ; x-ref: $1380 nop nop ldx #$00 b1388 jsr scroll_screen_down ; x-ref: $13b2 txa pha lda #level_tile_definition_tbl sta p_tmp_hi ldy #$00 b1397 lda (p_tmp_lo),y ; x-ref: $13a8 sta f0428,y ldx season_nr lda tbl_text_color_seasons,x sta fD828,y iny cpy #$28 bne b1397 jsr tick_gameplay_systems pla tax inx cpx #$19 bne b1388 jsr s45F0 lda tbl_level_complete_sprite1_ptr,x sta sprite_ptr_1 lda tbl_level_comple__sprite2_ptr,x sta sprite_ptr_2 lda tbl_level_complete_sprite1_color,x sta $d028 ; Sprite 1 Color jsr s15E7 lda #$90 sta $d003 ; Sprite 1 Y Pos sta $d005 ; Sprite 2 Y Pos lda #$60 sta $d002 ; Sprite 1 X Pos lda #$75 sta $d004 ; Sprite 2 X Pos j13DE lda $d000 ; x-ref: $13ed; Sprite 0 X Pos cmp #$8a beq b13F6 bcc b13F0 dec $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos j13EA jsr delay_short ; x-ref: $13f3 jmp j13DE b13F0 inc $d000 ; x-ref: $13e5; Sprite 0 X Pos jmp j13EA b13F6 lda $d001 ; x-ref: $13e3, $1405; Sprite 0 Y Pos cmp #$90 beq b140E bcc b1408 dec $d001 ; Sprite 0 Y Pos j1402 jsr delay_short ; x-ref: $140b jmp b13F6 b1408 inc $d001 ; x-ref: $13fd; Sprite 0 Y Pos jmp j1402 b140E ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $13fb b1410 lda txt_congratulations_pt1,x ; x-ref: $141e sta f0483,x lda #$07 sta fD883,x inx cpx #$12 bne b1410 jsr delay_long ldx #$00 b1425 lda txt_you_crash_cars,x ; x-ref: $1433 sta f04D2,x lda #$07 sta fD8D2,x inx cpx #$14 bne b1425 lda crashed_cars_tens clc adc #$30 sta a04DF lda crashed_cars_ones clc adc #$30 sta a04E0 jsr delay_long jsr delay_long ldx #$00 b144F lda txt_bonus_pts_are,x ; x-ref: $145d sta f0524,x lda #$03 sta fD924,x inx cpx #$10 bne b144F lda crashed_cars_tens bne b1469 lda crashed_cars_ones beq b1493 b1469 ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1462 b146B lda txt_multiplier_500,x ; x-ref: $1479 sta f0574,x lda #$04 sta fD974,x inx cpx #$0a bne b146B lda crashed_cars_tens clc adc #$30 sta f0574 lda crashed_cars_ones clc adc #$30 sta a0575 jmp j1850 jmp j14BA b1493 ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1467 b1495 lda txt_extra_bonus_points,x ; x-ref: $14a3 sta f0573,x lda #$03 sta fD973,x inx cpx #$12 bne b1495 jsr delay_long ldx #$00 b14AA lda txt_50000,x ; x-ref: $14b8 sta f05C9,x lda #$04 sta fD9C9,x inx cpx #$05 bne b14AA j14BA jsr increment_score_by_50000 ; x-ref: $1490 j14BD jsr delay_long ; x-ref: $1943 ldx #$00 b14C2 lda txt_next_way_is,x ; x-ref: $14d0 sta f068B,x lda #$07 sta fDA8B,x inx cpx #$0b bne b14C2 jmp show_next_season_screen .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Short busy-wait delay (~13 ms). Runs a nested loop with X=10 outer iterations ; and Y=256 inner iterations. Shares the loop body with delay_long. ; ; Inputs: None ; Outputs: X=0, Y=0 ; Side Effects: None (burns CPU time) ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- delay_short ldx #$0a ; 10 outer iterations ; x-ref: $13ea, $1402 delay_outer_loop ldy #$00 ; 256 inner iterations (Y wraps $00->$FF) ; x-ref: $14e8, $14f8 delay_inner_loop dey ; x-ref: $14e5, $14f5 bne delay_inner_loop dex bne delay_outer_loop rts .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Long busy-wait delay (~328 ms). X=$00 wraps to 256 outer iterations, each ; with 256 inner Y iterations. Falls through into delay_short's loop body. ; Used for dramatic pauses during level transitions and score displays. ; ; Inputs: None ; Outputs: X=0, Y=0 ; Side Effects: None (burns CPU time) ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- delay_long ldx #$00 ; X=$00 wraps to 256 outer iterations ; x-ref: $1420, $1447, $144a, $14a5, $14bd, ... ldy #$00 dey bne delay_inner_loop dex bne delay_outer_loop rts .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Shifts a large portion of Screen RAM down by one row (40 bytes) to create the ; scrolling effect. It initializes a zero-page pointer ($49/$4A) to the end of ; the scrolling region ($0747) and copies memory to pointer + 40 ($28). ; It iterates backwards until it reaches the HUD boundary at $0427, leaving row 0 ; (the HUD) intact. ; ; Inputs: None ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies Screen RAM ($0428-$076F) and zero-page pointers $49/$4A. ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- scroll_screen_down jsr shift_colour_row_pipeline ; shift colour pipeline; A=$07 on return ; x-ref: $11f3, $1388 sta p_tmp_hi lda # 0 bne b159A lda #$00 sta season_nr b159A ldx #$15 ; Countdown delay: 21 iterations ; x-ref: $1593 b159C txa ; x-ref: $15e2 pha jsr delay_long pla tax dex jmp j15E2 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Increments the player's score by 50000 points. ; This routine calls an internal loop 5 times (controlled by Y register). In each ; loop, it increments the ten-thousand digit (index 2 of the $0825 score array) by 1. ; Overflows are handled seamlessly via a cascading BCD-like carry lookup. After ; adding 5 to the ten-thousand position, it refreshes the HUD to display the new score. ; ; Inputs: None (relies on $0825 array) ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies the Score array and calls update_hud_display. ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- increment_score_by_50000 ldy #$00 ; x-ref: $14ba, $5377, $537a b15A9 ldx #$02 ; x-ref: $15c4 j15AB lda score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $15bb clc adc #$01 cmp #$0a bne b15BE lda #$00 sta score_7digits,x dex jmp j15AB b15BE sta score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $15b3 iny cpy #$05 bne b15A9 jmp update_hud_display ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Increments the player's 7-digit score uniformly. ; Because the score is stored as an array of 7 individual digits (0-9) at $0825, ; this routine performs a manual base-10 addition. It starts at the least ; significant digit (index 6, $082B), adds 1, and carries over any overflow (10) ; to the next significant digit. ; ; Inputs: Score array at $0825-$082B ; Outputs: Modified Score array ; Side Effects: None ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- increment_score ldx #$06 ; Start at least significant digit (index 6) ; x-ref: $181b, $4759 j15CB lda score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $15db clc adc #$01 ; Add 1 to the current digit cmp #$0a ; Check for base-10 overflow bne b15DE lda #$00 sta score_7digits,x dex ; Move to next most significant digit (carry) jmp j15CB b15DE sta score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $15d3 rts j15E2 bne b159C ; Loop until X=0, then fall through to j16A1 ; x-ref: $15a4 jmp j16A1 s15E7 sta $d029 ; x-ref: $13c9; Sprite 2 Color lda #$c0 ; hero sprite frame #0 sta sprite_ptr_0 lda #$00 sta $d017 ; Sprites Expand 2x Vertical (Y) sta $d01d ; Sprites Expand 2x Horizontal (X) rts .byte $20, $08, $8d, $21, $08, $60, $00, $00 .encode .enc "screen" txt_congratulations_pt1 .text "CONGRATULATIONS !!" ; x-ref: $1410 txt_you_crash_cars .text " YOU CRASH CARS" ; x-ref: $1425 txt_bonus_pts_are .text "BONUS POINTS ARE" ; x-ref: $144f txt_multiplier_500 .text " X 500 =" ; x-ref: $146b txt_extra_bonus_points .text "EXTRA BONUS POINTS" ; x-ref: $1495 txt_50000 .text "50000" ; x-ref: $14aa txt_next_way_is .text "NEXT WAY IS" ; x-ref: $14c2 txt_good_luck .text "GOOD LUCK!.." ; x-ref: $1564 .endencode .byte $00, $00 tbl_level_comple__sprite2_ptr .byte $d5, $d6, $d8, $d7 ; x-ref: $13bd tbl_level_complete_sprite1_ptr .byte $d9, $dc, $da, $db ; x-ref: $13b7 tbl_level_complete_sprite1_color .byte $0d, $01, $0a, $01 ; x-ref: $13c3 tbl_text_color_seasons .byte $0d, $0c, $0f, $09 ; x-ref: $1362, $139f, $1729, $506f .encode .enc "screen" txt_seasons .text "SUMMER AUTUMN WINTER SPRING @" ; x-ref: $154b .endencode j16A1 lda #$00 ; x-ref: $15e4 sta crashed_cars_tens sta crashed_cars_ones jmp j50BE brk brk brk brk ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Updates the HUD text on the top row of the screen ($0400). ; Converts numeric gameplay variables such as the current score, high score, and ; other state values into screencodes (by adding $30) and writes them directly ; to Screen RAM. ; ; Inputs: Numeric values at $0821, $0822, $0823, $0825-$082B (Score), and $0F50-$0F56 (High Score) ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies Screen RAM ($0403-$0427) to update visible UI numbers. ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- update_hud_display jsr advance_distance_counter ; x-ref: $11cd, $15c6, $1818, $1940, $1d4e, ... clc adc #$30 ; Convert to Screencode '0'-'9' sta a0420 lda crashed_cars_ones clc adc #$30 sta a0421 lda lives_tens clc adc #$30 sta a0426 lda lives_ones clc adc #$30 sta a0427 jsr s1FA7 jmp j16F2 ora #$18 adc #$31 sta a041A jmp j16F2 lda #$31 sta a0419 lda level_nr clc adc #$27 sta a041A j16F2 ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $16d7, $16e1 b16F4 lda score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $1709 clc adc #$30 ; Convert Score to Screencode sta f0403,x ; Write Score to Screen lda hi_score_7digits,x clc adc #$30 ; Convert High Score to Screencode sta f040E,x ; Write High Score to Screen inx cpx #$07 bne b16F4 rts s170C jsr restore_game_vars ; x-ref: $1191, $50a2, $50bb, $514d, $5172, ... ldx #$00 b1711 jsr s50D2 ; x-ref: $1739 lda f8110,x sta f0500,x lda f8210,x sta f0600,x lda f8300,x sta f06F0,x ldy season_nr lda tbl_text_color_seasons,y sta fD828,x sta fD900,x sta fDA00,x sta fDAF0,x inx bne b1711 ldx #$00 txa b173E sta $d002,x ; x-ref: $1744; Sprite 1 X Pos inx cpx #$0e bne b173E lda #$a8 sta $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos lda #$b0 jsr s5035 lda #$c0 sta sprite_ptr_0 lda #$04 sta $d027 ; Sprite 0 Color lda #$ff sta $d015 ; Sprite display Enable lda #$00 sta player_is_jumping lda #$1f sta $d01c ; Sprites Multi-Color Mode Select lda #$00 sta a08E0 sta a08E2 lda #$08 sta a08E1 lda #$50 sta player_speed lda #$00 sta tbl_enemy_car_state sta a0929 sta a092A sta a092B sta a0980 sta a0981 sta a0982 sta col_active jmp j3CF0 brk j1799 jsr update_hiscore_if_beaten ; x-ref: $4992 lda crashed_cars_tens rts ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Handles horizontal movement for the player car (Sprite 0). ; Checks the game state flag at $098A. If active, reads the parsed input state ; at zero page $00F5. Bit 2 ($04) corresponds to Left, Bit 3 ($08) to Right. ; If left is pressed, Sprite 0's X position ($D000) is moved left by 6 pixels, ; clamping at 0. If right is pressed, it is moved right by 6 pixels, clamping ; at $FF (255). ; ; Inputs: State flag $098A, Parsed Input state at $00F5 ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies Sprite 0 X position ($D000) ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- handle_player_movement lda col_active ; x-ref: $181e, $475c beq b17A6 b17A5 rts ; x-ref: $17b2 b17A6 lda @w joy_state ; Check input state array at $00F5 ; x-ref: $17a3 and #$04 ; Check Bit 2 (Left) beq b17C2 lda @w joy_state and #$08 ; Check Bit 3 (Right) bne b17A5 lda $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos clc adc #$06 ; Move Right 6 pixels bcc b17BE lda #$ff ; Clamp to max string edge ($FF) b17BE sta $d000 ; x-ref: $17ba, $17c8, $17cc; Sprite 0 X Pos rts b17C2 lda $d000 ; x-ref: $17ab; Sprite 0 X Pos sec sbc #$06 ; Move Left 6 pixels bcs b17BE lda #$00 ; Clamp to left edge ($00) beq b17BE check_acceleration_conditions lda col_active ; x-ref: $1832 beq b17D4 rts b17D4 jmp handle_acceleration ; x-ref: $17d1 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 update_hiscore_if_beaten ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1799 b17DF lda hi_score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $17ec cmp score_7digits,x bmi b17EF bne b17EE inx cpx #$07 bne b17DF b17EE rts ; x-ref: $17e7 b17EF ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $17e5 b17F1 lda score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $17fa sta hi_score_7digits,x inx cpx #$07 bne b17F1 rts .byte $00, $00, $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Initializes the game and enters the main game loop. ; The main loop banks out BASIC to play music/SFX, then calls various game logic ; and rendering subroutines, eventually looping back. ; ; Inputs: None ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies 6510 IO Port, updates game state and screen ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- main jsr init_game_state ; x-ref: $129c game_init_and_loop jsr init_vic_video ; x-ref: $12f4, $50e0, $5107, $511b, $5128 jsr init_screen_and_sprites main_loop lda a01 ; 6510 IO Port ; x-ref: $4fb9 and #$fe ; Bank out Basic ROM sta a01 jsr scroll_and_draw_map_row ; Probably play music/SFX lda a01 ora #$01 ; Bank Basic ROM back in sta a01 jsr update_hud_display jsr increment_score jsr handle_player_movement jsr check_jump_input jsr update_jump_animation jsr check_background_collision jsr apply_y_offset lda player_is_jumping bne b1835 jsr check_acceleration_conditions b1835 jsr delay_frame_by_speed ; x-ref: $1830 jsr update_pickup_timer jsr process_entities_and_input jsr update_moving_sprites jsr update_explosion_animations jsr update_sprite_animations jsr detect_player_car_collision jsr update_enemies_and_check_jump jmp main_loop_apply_recoil j1850 lda #$00 ; x-ref: $148d sta crashed_cars_bonus_10k sta crashed_cars_bonus_1k sta crashed_cars_bonus_100 ldy crashed_cars_ones j185E beq b1885 ; x-ref: $1882 tya pha ldy #$05 b1864 ldx #$02 ; x-ref: $187d j1866 lda crashed_cars_bonus_10k,x ; x-ref: $1876 clc adc #$01 cmp #$0a bne b1879 lda #$00 sta crashed_cars_bonus_10k,x dex jmp j1866 b1879 sta crashed_cars_bonus_10k,x ; x-ref: $186e dey bne b1864 pla tay dey jmp j185E b1885 ldy crashed_cars_tens ; x-ref: $185e j1888 beq b18AF ; x-ref: $18ac tya pha ldy #$05 b188E ldx #$01 ; x-ref: $18a7 j1890 lda crashed_cars_bonus_10k,x ; x-ref: $18a0 clc adc #$01 cmp #$0a bne b18A3 lda #$00 sta crashed_cars_bonus_10k,x dex jmp j1890 b18A3 sta crashed_cars_bonus_10k,x ; x-ref: $1898 dey bne b188E pla tay dey jmp j1888 b18AF ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1888 j18B1 lda crashed_cars_bonus_10k,x ; x-ref: $18b7 bne b18BA inx jmp j18B1 b18BA lda crashed_cars_bonus_10k,x ; x-ref: $18b4, $18cb clc adc #$30 sta f057F,x lda #$04 sta fD97F,x inx cpx #$03 bne b18BA lda #$30 sta a0582 sta a0583 lda #$04 sta aD982 sta aD983 ldy crashed_cars_bonus_100 j18E0 beq b18FE ; x-ref: $18fb ldx #$04 j18E4 lda score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $18f4 clc adc #$01 cmp #$0a bne b18F7 lda #$00 sta score_7digits,x dex jmp j18E4 b18F7 sta score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $18ec dey jmp j18E0 b18FE ldy crashed_cars_bonus_1k ; x-ref: $18e0 j1901 beq b191F ; x-ref: $191c ldx #$03 j1905 lda score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $1915 clc adc #$01 cmp #$0a bne b1918 lda #$00 sta score_7digits,x dex jmp j1905 b1918 sta score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $190d dey jmp j1901 b191F ldy crashed_cars_bonus_10k ; x-ref: $1901 j1922 beq b1940 ; x-ref: $193d ldx #$02 j1926 lda score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $1936 clc adc #$01 cmp #$0a bne b1939 lda #$00 sta score_7digits,x dex jmp j1926 b1939 sta score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $192e dey jmp j1922 b1940 jsr update_hud_display ; x-ref: $1922 jmp j14BD .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Checks if the Fire button is pressed to initiate a car jump. ; Reads the parsed input state at $00F5 (Bit 4 = Fire button). If the jump ; action is requested and the car is not already jumping (jump state $0805 is 0), ; it initializes the jump animation state machine, sets the initial sprite ; pointer for the jump, and slightly shifts the car's X position. ; ; Inputs: Parsed input state at $00F5, jump state at $0805 ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies $0805 (jump active), $0806 (jump frame), ; and Sprite 0 X position ($D000). ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- check_jump_input lda @w joy_state ; Read input state ; x-ref: $1821, $3ad7, $3af3, $475f and #$10 ; Check Bit 4 (Fire button) beq b1A08 b1A07 rts ; x-ref: $1a0b b1A08 lda player_is_jumping ; Check if already jumping ($0805 != 0) ; x-ref: $1a05 bne b1A07 jsr is_speed_above_100_else_return lsr a lsr a jsr set_jump_timer_base lda #$01 ; Set jump active flag sta player_is_jumping lda #$01 ; Reset jump animation frame sta jump_anim_frame lda jump_timer_base lsr a lsr a lsr a sta jump_frame_timer lda #$d4 ; Set Sprite 0 pointer for jump start sta sprite_ptr_0 lda $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos clc adc #$04 sta $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos nop nop nop rts ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Processes the jump animation state machine for Sprite 0. ; This routine runs continuously in the game loop. If $0805 indicates a jump is ; active, it decrements the frame timer $0811. Once the timer elapses, it ; advances the animation frame $0806 and uses a switch statement ($1A51) to update ; the sprite pointer, sizes, and position to create a jumping arc. ; When the animation reaches the end (frame 9), it resets $0805 to 0. ; ; Inputs: Jump state at $0805, animation frame $0806, timer $0811 ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies Sprite 0 X position ($D000), Sprite Pointer ($07F8), ; and Sprite Expansion bits ($D017, $D01D). ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- update_jump_animation lda player_is_jumping ; Check jump active flag ; x-ref: $1824, $4762 bne b1A40 b1A3F rts ; x-ref: $1a43 b1A40 dec jump_frame_timer ; Decrement jump frame timer ; x-ref: $1a3d bne b1A3F lda jump_timer_base lsr a lsr a lsr a sta jump_frame_timer jsr increment_jump_frame ; Increment animation frame (in A) cmp #$09 beq b1A82 cmp #$08 beq b1A7F cmp #$07 beq b1A7C cmp #$06 beq b1A79 cmp #$05 beq b1A76 cmp #$04 beq b1A73 cmp #$03 beq b1A70 jmp jump_anim_frame_1_2 b1A70 jmp jump_anim_expand_sprite ; x-ref: $1a6b b1A73 jmp jump_anim_frame_4_5 ; x-ref: $1a67 b1A76 jmp jump_anim_frame_4_5 ; x-ref: $1a63 b1A79 jmp jump_anim_frame_0 ; x-ref: $1a5f b1A7C jmp jump_anim_shrink_sprite ; x-ref: $1a5b b1A7F jmp jump_anim_frame_6_or_8 ; x-ref: $1a57 b1A82 jmp jump_anim_terminate ; x-ref: $1a53 jump_anim_frame_1_2 lda #$d3 ; Animation Frame 1 & 2: Draw ascending sprite ; x-ref: $1a6d sta sprite_ptr_0 lda $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos sec sbc #$00 sta $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos rts jump_anim_expand_sprite lda #$d2 ; Animation Frame 3: Max height, expand sprite ; x-ref: $1a70 sta sprite_ptr_0 lda #$01 sta $d017 ; Sprites Expand 2x Vertical (Y) sta $d01d ; Sprites Expand 2x Horizontal (X) lda $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos sec sbc #$0c ; Compensate for center shift on expansion sta $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos rts jump_anim_frame_4_5 lda #$d4 ; Animation Frame 4 & 5: Expanded descending ; x-ref: $1a73, $1a76 sta sprite_ptr_0 rts jump_anim_shrink_sprite lda #$00 ; Animation Frame 7: Shrink sprite back ; x-ref: $1a7c sta $d017 ; Sprites Expand 2x Vertical (Y) sta $d01d ; Sprites Expand 2x Horizontal (X) lda #$d3 sta sprite_ptr_0 lda $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos clc adc #$0c ; Compensate for center shift on shrink sta $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos rts jump_anim_frame_6_or_8 lda #$d4 ; x-ref: $1a7f sta sprite_ptr_0 lda $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos clc adc #$00 sta $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos rts jump_anim_terminate lda #$00 ; Animation Frame 9 (End): Reset sequence ; x-ref: $1a82 sta player_is_jumping lda #$c0 jsr s4C30 lda $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos sec sbc #$04 sta $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos rts increment_jump_frame inc jump_anim_frame ; x-ref: $1a4e lda jump_anim_frame rts jump_anim_frame_0 lda #$d2 ; x-ref: $1a79 sta sprite_ptr_0 rts set_jump_timer_base clc ; x-ref: $1a12 adc #$0f sta jump_timer_base rts .byte $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Checks if the player's car has collided with physical background obstacles. ; First, checks if the car is actively jumping (ignores collision if jump state ; is non-zero). If on the ground, transforms Sprite 0's X and Y pixel positions ; into 40x25 character grid coordinates (column and row). It then calculates ; a pointer into Screen RAM ($0400) relative to the car's current position. ; Finally, tests the four corners surrounding the car's footprint by fetching ; the characters and calling $46DE to see if they are a fatal obstacle tile. ; ; Inputs: Jump State at $0805, Sprite 0 X/Y Positions ($D000, $D001) ; Outputs: None (Direct exit/jump on collision via $46DE) ; Side Effects: Can initiate crash sequence, mutates temp pointers $49 and $4A. ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- check_background_collision lda player_is_jumping ; Ignore collision if jumping ; x-ref: $1827, $4765 beq b1B06 rts b1B06 lda $d000 ; Convert Pixel X to Char Column (divide by 8) ; x-ref: $1b03; Sprite 0 X Pos sec sbc #$10 lsr a lsr a lsr a tay lda #>f0400 sta p_tmp_hi lda # 1st? check 2nd inx cpx #$07 bne b1B9D lda #$02 ; score == 1st → rank 2 (below tie) store_rank_and_insert sta name_entry_substate ; store ranking (0-5) ; x-ref: $1bb6, $1bcc, $1bd1, $1be7, $1bec, ... jmp insert_score_in_table b1BB4 lda #$01 ; x-ref: $1ba3 jmp store_rank_and_insert check_2nd_place ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1ba5 b1BBB lda f7408,x ; 2nd place score at $7408 ; x-ref: $1bc8 cmp score_7digits,x bmi b1BCF bne check_3rd_place inx cpx #$07 bne b1BBB lda #$03 jmp store_rank_and_insert b1BCF lda #$02 ; x-ref: $1bc1 jmp store_rank_and_insert check_3rd_place ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1bc3 b1BD6 lda f7410,x ; 3rd place score at $7410 ; x-ref: $1be3 cmp score_7digits,x bmi b1BEA bne check_4th_place inx cpx #$07 bne b1BD6 lda #$04 jmp store_rank_and_insert b1BEA lda #$03 ; x-ref: $1bdc jmp store_rank_and_insert check_4th_place ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1bde b1BF1 lda f7418,x ; 4th place score at $7418 ; x-ref: $1bfe cmp score_7digits,x bmi b1C05 bne check_5th_place inx cpx #$07 bne b1BF1 lda #$05 jmp store_rank_and_insert b1C05 lda #$04 ; x-ref: $1bf7 jmp store_rank_and_insert check_5th_place ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1bf9 b1C0C lda f7420,x ; 5th place score at $7420 ; x-ref: $1c19 cmp score_7digits,x bmi b1C20 bne b1C25 inx cpx #$07 bne b1C0C score_not_ranked lda #$00 ; rank 0 = not in top 5 ; x-ref: $1c25 jmp store_rank_and_insert b1C20 lda #$05 ; x-ref: $1c12 jmp store_rank_and_insert b1C25 jmp score_not_ranked ; x-ref: $1c14 ; --- Shift table entries down and insert new score --- insert_score_in_table lda name_entry_substate ; x-ref: $1bb1 beq b1C7C ; rank 0 = not ranked, skip insertion cmp #$05 b1C2F beq b1C7C ; x-ref: $1c45, $1c59, $1c6d jsr shift_name_entries_down ; shift name entries down nop b1C35 lda f7418,x ; shift 5th→6th (discard) ; x-ref: $1c3e sta f7420,x inx cpx #$08 bne b1C35 lda name_entry_substate cmp #$04 beq b1C2F ldx #$00 b1C49 lda f7410,x ; x-ref: $1c52 sta f7418,x inx cpx #$08 bne b1C49 lda name_entry_substate cmp #$03 beq b1C2F ldx #$00 ; shift 3rd→4th b1C5D lda f7408,x ; x-ref: $1c66 sta f7410,x inx cpx #$08 bne b1C5D lda name_entry_substate cmp #$02 beq b1C2F ldx #$00 ; shift 2nd→3rd b1C71 lda f7400,x ; x-ref: $1c7a sta f7408,x inx cpx #$08 bne b1C71 b1C7C lda name_entry_substate ; x-ref: $1c2b, $1c2f beq display_high_score_table sec sbc #$01 asl a asl a asl a tay ldx #$00 copy_score_to_slot =*+$02 b1C8A lda score_7digits,x ; x-ref: $1c99 sta f7400,y lda #$20 sta f7430,y iny inx ; copy 7 score digits to table cpx #$07 bne b1C8A ; --- Render all 5 entries: names to screen --- display_high_score_table ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1c7f b1C9D lda f7430,x ; name entry 1 (3 chars) ; x-ref: $1cbe sta f0618,x lda f7438,x sta f0668,x lda f7440,x sta f06B8,x ; name entry 4 lda f7448,x sta f0708,x lda f7450,x sta f0758,x inx cpx #$03 bne b1C9D ldx #$00 ; --- Render score digits (+$30 = screen code '0') --- display_scores_as_digits lda f7400,x ; x-ref: $1cf2 clc adc #$30 ; + $30 = ASCII/screencode '0' sta f061C,x lda f7408,x clc adc #$30 sta f066C,x lda f7410,x clc adc #$30 sta f06BC,x lda f7418,x clc adc #$30 sta f070C,x lda f7420,x clc adc #$30 sta f075C,x inx cpx #$07 bne display_scores_as_digits jmp after_table_update ; --- Shift 3-char name entries down in the name table ($7430) --- shift_name_entries_down lda name_entry_substate ; x-ref: $1c31 cmp #$05 beq b1D7C cmp #$00 beq b1D7C ldx #$00 b1D04 lda f7448,x ; shift 5th name → 6th (discard) ; x-ref: $1d0d sta f7450,x inx cpx #$03 bne b1D04 lda name_entry_substate cmp #$04 beq b1D4B ldx #$00 b1D18 lda f7440,x ; shift 4th → 5th ; x-ref: $1d21 sta f7448,x inx cpx #$03 bne b1D18 lda name_entry_substate cmp #$03 beq b1D4B ldx #$00 b1D2C lda f7438,x ; shift 3rd → 4th ; x-ref: $1d35 sta f7440,x inx cpx #$03 bne b1D2C lda name_entry_substate cmp #$02 beq b1D4B ldx #$00 b1D40 lda f7430,x ; shift 2nd → 3rd ; x-ref: $1d49 sta f7438,x inx cpx #$03 bne b1D40 show_not_ranked_msg =*+$01 b1D4B ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $1d14, $1d28, $1d3c rts ; --- Check if player qualified; if so, enter initials --- after_table_update jsr update_hud_display ; copy message to screen ; x-ref: $1cf4 lda name_entry_substate bne b1D59 ; color = cyan b1D56 jmp show_not_in_top_5_message ; x-ref: $1d5b b1D59 cmp #$00 ; x-ref: $1d54 beq b1D56 lda #$09 ; countdown timer tens digit = 9 sta highscore_timer_tens lda #$09 sta highscore_timer_ones ; countdown timer ones digit = 9 lda #$05 sta active_row lda #$06 sta active_col ; starting grid column = 6 ldx #$00 ; High Score input loop: display cursor, read joystick highscore_input_loop jsr draw_highscore_timer_and_cursor ; x-ref: $1de7 jsr highlight_cursor_cell nop nop nop b1D7C nop ; x-ref: $1cfc, $1d00 nop nop nop nop nop nop lda @w joy_state ; read joystick port and #$1f ; mask direction + fire bits cmp #$1e ; $1E = up beq highscore_joy_up cmp #$1d ; $1D = down beq highscore_joy_down cmp #$1b ; $1B = left beq highscore_joy_left cmp #$17 ; $17 = right beq highscore_joy_right cmp #$0f ; $0F = fire button beq highscore_joy_fire ; --- Decrement countdown timer; end entry when expired --- decrement_timer jsr draw_highscore_timer_and_cursor ; display timer, then delay ; x-ref: $1e6c, $1e7f, $1e92, $1ea8, $1f97, ... txa pha ldx #$00 b1DA3 ldy #$00 ; x-ref: $1da9 b1DA5 dey ; x-ref: $1da6 bne b1DA5 dex bne b1DA3 pla tax lda highscore_timer_ones sec ; ones digit -= 1 sbc #$01 sta highscore_timer_ones cmp #$ff ; underflow? wrap to 9 bne b1DC8 lda #$09 ; reset ones to 9 sta highscore_timer_ones lda highscore_timer_tens ; tens digit -= 1 sec sbc #$01 sta highscore_timer_tens b1DC8 lda highscore_timer_tens ; x-ref: $1db8, $46d1 bne b1DE7 lda highscore_timer_ones bne b1DE7 lda highscore_timer_tens clc adc #$30 sta a05CB lda highscore_timer_ones clc adc #$30 sta a05CC jmp j1E0E b1DE7 jmp highscore_input_loop ; RUB END " ; x-ref: $1b68 .text " " .text " " .text " 1- " .text " " .text " 2- " .text " " enter_high_score_screen_3 .text " " ; x-ref: $1b6e .text " 3- " .text " " enter_high_score_screen_4 .text " 4- " ; x-ref: $1b74 .text " " .text " 5- " .text " " .text " " .text " " .text " " .text " " .text " " txt_you_arent_in_the_five_best_scores .text "YOU AREN""T IN THE FIVE BEST SCORESY Z " ; x-ref: $1dfe .text "EST SC X" .endencode .binary "c64_burnin_rubber_3000_397f.bin" ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Detects collisions between NPC cars (enemy slots 0..2 vs 1..3). ; If two active cars are within 16x16 pixels, calculates a bounce response, ; setting new directions, step counts, and lifetimes based on car types. ; ; Inputs: tbl_enemy_car_state, Sprite X/Y regs ($D002/$D003), f092C, tbl_sprite_step_count_0 ; Outputs: tbl_enemy_sprite_direction, tbl_enemy_sprite_active, tbl_enemy_sprite_step_count, tbl_enemy_sprite_lifetime ; Side Effects: Calls $5230 and updates tbl_enemy_sprite_state if both cars were collision-inactive. ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- detect_npc_car_collision ldy #$00 ; x-ref: $3ae4 b3982 lda tbl_enemy_car_state,y ; x-ref: $398c cmp #$01 beq b398F b3989 iny ; x-ref: $3994 cpy #$03 bne b3982 rts b398F tya ; x-ref: $3987 tax b3991 inx ; x-ref: $399b, $39cf, $39fc, $3ad1 cpx #$04 beq b3989 lda tbl_enemy_car_state,x cmp #$01 bne b3991 txa pha asl a tax tya pha asl a tay lda $d002,y ; Sprite 1 X Pos cmp $d002,x ; Sprite 1 X Pos bcc b39BB sec sbc $d002,x ; Sprite 1 X Pos pha lda #$01 sta collision_rel_x pla jmp j39C7 b39BB lda #$00 ; x-ref: $39ab sta collision_rel_x lda $d002,x ; Sprite 1 X Pos sec sbc $d002,y ; Sprite 1 X Pos j39C7 cmp #$10 ; x-ref: $39b8 bcc b39D2 pla tay pla tax jmp b3991 b39D2 lda $d003,y ; x-ref: $39c9; Sprite 1 Y Pos cmp $d003,x ; Sprite 1 Y Pos bcc b39E8 sec sbc $d003,x ; Sprite 1 Y Pos pha lda #$01 sta collision_rel_y pla jmp j39F4 b39E8 lda #$00 ; x-ref: $39d8 sta collision_rel_y lda $d003,x ; Sprite 1 Y Pos sec sbc $d003,y ; Sprite 1 Y Pos j39F4 cmp #$10 ; x-ref: $39e5 bcc b39FF pla tay pla tax jmp b3991 b39FF pla ; x-ref: $39f6 tay pla tax lda collision_rel_x bne b3A27 lda collision_rel_y bne b3A1A lda #$01 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,y lda #$04 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,x jmp j3A43 b3A1A lda #$03 ; x-ref: $3a0b sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,y lda #$02 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,x jmp j3A43 b3A27 lda collision_rel_y ; x-ref: $3a06 bne b3A39 lda #$02 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,y lda #$03 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,x jmp j3A43 b3A39 lda #$04 ; x-ref: $3a2a sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,y lda #$01 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,x j3A43 lda tbl_enemy_sprite_active,x ; x-ref: $3a17, $3a24, $3a36 bne b3A58 lda tbl_enemy_sprite_active,y bne b3A58 lda #$01 jsr set_collision_state_and_play_sfx sta tbl_enemy_sprite_state,y jmp j3A60 b3A58 lda #$01 ; x-ref: $3a46, $3a4b sta tbl_enemy_sprite_active,x sta tbl_enemy_sprite_active,y j3A60 txa ; x-ref: $3a55 pha tya pha lda tbl_enemy_car_type,x tax lda tbl_enemy_car_type,y tay txa asl a asl a asl a sta p_tmp_lo tya clc adc p_tmp_lo tax lda tbl_sprite_step_count_0,x sta p_tmp_lo pla tay pla tax lda p_tmp_lo sta tbl_enemy_sprite_step_count,y txa pha tya pha lda tbl_enemy_car_type,x tax lda tbl_enemy_car_type,y tay asl a asl a asl a sta p_tmp_lo txa clc adc p_tmp_lo tay lda tbl_sprite_step_count_0,y sta p_tmp_lo pla tay pla tax lda p_tmp_lo sta tbl_enemy_sprite_step_count,x lda tbl_enemy_car_type,x cmp #$02 bne b3AB8 lda #$03 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_lifetime,x jmp j3ABD b3AB8 lda #$08 ; x-ref: $3aae sta tbl_enemy_sprite_lifetime,x j3ABD lda tbl_enemy_car_type,y ; x-ref: $3ab5 cmp #$02 bne b3ACC lda #$03 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_lifetime,y jmp j3AD1 b3ACC lda #$08 ; x-ref: $3ac2 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_lifetime,y j3AD1 jmp b3991 ; x-ref: $3ac9 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; A small wrapper routine called by the main loop. ; It manages spawning new enemy cars, and then handles player jump inputs. ; ; Inputs: None ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Can spawn entities and mutate player state. ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- process_entities_and_input jsr spawn_enemy_cars ; x-ref: $183b jsr check_jump_input rts brk .byte $00, $00, $00, $00 ; -=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-= s3AE0 txa ; x-ref: $4cd6, $4fb3 pha tya pha jsr detect_npc_car_collision pla tay pla tax rts ; -=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-= pha asl a tay rts ; -=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-= update_enemies_and_check_jump jsr update_enemy_cars ; x-ref: $184a jsr check_jump_input rts .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Detects collision between the player (sprite 0) and any NPC car (slots 0..3). ; Exits early if a crash SFX is already playing on Voice 1. ; ; For each NPC slot with car_state == 1 (on-road/active), checks if its sprite ; is within 16 pixels of the player in both X and Y. On collision: ; - Records which quadrant the NPC occupies relative to the player: ; collision_rel_x: 0 = NPC left of player, 1 = NPC right ; collision_rel_y: 0 = NPC above player, 1 = NPC below ; - Sets sprite_direction[x] so the NPC bounces away from the player ; - Plays crash SFX on SID Voice 1 (noise, freq=$0112, A=1/D=8) ; - Computes sprite_lifetime = (npc_speed >> type_shift) + (player_speed >> type_shift) + 4 ; - Computes a098B = (npc_speed >> type_shift) + (player_speed >> type_shift) + 1 ; - Jumps (no RTS) to apply_collision_speed_score ; ; Inputs: sfx_voice_1_en, car_state[0..3], VIC-II regs $D000-$D009, ; f0900[0..3] (NPC speeds), a0804 (player speed), ; f092C[0..3] (car type index), f3F60/f3F68/f3F70 (type tables) ; Outputs: sprite_direction[x], sprite_active[x], sprite_lifetime[x], ; collision_rel_x, collision_rel_y, a0988, a098A, a098B ; Side Effects: Plays crash SFX on Voice 1; falls through to apply_collision_speed_score ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- detect_player_car_collision lda player_is_jumping ; Skip if crash SFX already playing on Voice 1 ; x-ref: $1847 bne b3B13 ldx #$00 b3B07 lda tbl_enemy_car_state,x ; x-ref: $3b11 cmp #$01 ; Only check cars in state 1 (on-road/active) beq b3B14 j3B0E inx ; x-ref: $3b2a, $3b42, $3b5c, $3b71, $3e3f, ... cpx #$04 ; 4 NPC slots (0..3) bne b3B07 b3B13 rts ; x-ref: $3b03 b3B14 txa ; x-ref: $3b0c pha asl a tax lda $d002,x ; X = slot * 2 (VIC-II sprite reg offset); Sprite 1 X Pos cmp $d000 ; Compare NPC X vs player X; Sprite 0 X Pos bcc b3B35 sec sbc $d000 ; Sprite 0 X Pos cmp #$10 ; Proximity threshold: 16 pixels bcc b3B2D pla tax jmp j3B0E b3B2D lda #$01 ; x-ref: $3b26 sta collision_rel_x ; NPC is right of player (collision_rel_x=1) jmp j3B4A b3B35 lda $d000 ; x-ref: $3b1e; Sprite 0 X Pos sec sbc $d002,x ; Sprite 1 X Pos cmp #$10 bcc b3B45 pla tax jmp j3B0E b3B45 lda #$00 ; x-ref: $3b3e sta collision_rel_x ; NPC is left of player (collision_rel_x=0) j3B4A lda $d003,x ; Now check Y proximity ; x-ref: $3b32; Sprite 1 Y Pos cmp $d001 ; Sprite 0 Y Pos bcc b3B64 sec sbc $d001 ; Sprite 0 Y Pos cmp #$10 ; Proximity threshold: 16 pixels bcc b3B5F pla tax jmp j3B0E b3B5F lda #$01 ; NPC below player — stores collision_rel_y=1, plays crash SFX ; x-ref: $3b58 jmp j3B76 b3B64 lda $d001 ; x-ref: $3b50; Sprite 0 Y Pos sec sbc $d003,x ; Sprite 1 Y Pos cmp #$10 bcc b3B74 pla tax jmp j3B0E b3B74 lda #$00 ; NPC above player — stores collision_rel_y=0, plays crash SFX ; x-ref: $3b6d j3B76 jsr set_col_y_dir_play_sfx ; x-ref: $3b61 pla tax lda collision_rel_x ; Branch on X side to pick bounce direction bne b3B9F lda collision_rel_y bne b3B92 lda #$04 sta col_quadrant lda #$01 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,x ; NPC left+above → bounce up-left (dir 1) jmp j3BBB b3B92 lda #$02 ; x-ref: $3b83 sta col_quadrant lda #$03 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,x ; NPC left+below → bounce down-left (dir 3) jmp j3BBB b3B9F lda collision_rel_y ; x-ref: $3b7e bne b3BB1 lda #$03 sta col_quadrant lda #$02 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,x ; NPC right+above → bounce up-right (dir 2) jmp j3BBB b3BB1 lda #$01 ; x-ref: $3ba2 sta col_quadrant lda #$04 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,x ; NPC right+below → bounce down-right (dir 4) j3BBB lda #$01 ; x-ref: $3b8f, $3b9c, $3bae sta tbl_enemy_sprite_active,x ; Activate bounce slot sta col_active lda tbl_enemy_car_type,x tay lda tbl_sprite_step_count_1,y sta tbl_enemy_sprite_step_count,x ; Pixels moved per step (from car-type table) lda f3F60,y sta col_step_px lda f3F70,y pha tay lda f0900,x ; lifetime = (npc_speed >> type_shift) + (player_speed >> type_shift) + 4 b3BDB lsr a ; x-ref: $3bdd dey bne b3BDB sta p_tmp_lo pla tay lda player_speed b3BE6 lsr a ; x-ref: $3be8 dey bne b3BE6 clc adc p_tmp_lo clc adc #$04 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_lifetime,x ; Longer lifetime for faster collisions ldy a3F78 lda f0900,x ; a098B = same formula + 1 (feeds into score) b3BF9 lsr a ; x-ref: $3bfb dey bne b3BF9 sta p_tmp_lo ldy a3F78 lda player_speed b3C05 lsr a ; x-ref: $3c07 dey bne b3C05 clc adc p_tmp_lo clc adc #$01 sta col_frames_left jmp apply_collision_speed_score ; Update player speed and score based on collision check_road_collision txa ; x-ref: $3d2d, $3d5e, $3d7a, $3d96 pha tya pha jsr check_sprite_offscreen sec sbc #$10 lsr a lsr a lsr a tay lda $d003,x ; Sprite 1 Y Pos sec sbc #$32 lsr a lsr a lsr a tax lda #f0400 sta p_tmp_hi j3C35 cpx #$00 ; x-ref: $3c47 beq b3C4A lda p_tmp_lo clc adc #$28 sta p_tmp_lo lda p_tmp_hi adc #$00 sta p_tmp_hi dex jmp j3C35 b3C4A lda (p_tmp_lo),y ; x-ref: $3c37 cmp #$20 beq b3C54 cmp #$65 bne b3C64 b3C54 iny ; x-ref: $3c4e lda (p_tmp_lo),y cmp #$20 beq b3C5F cmp #$65 bne b3C64 b3C5F pla ; x-ref: $3c59 tay pla tax rts b3C64 pla ; x-ref: $3c52, $3c5d, $3cca tay pla tax pla pla pla tax lda tbl_enemy_sprite_active,x bne b3C79 lda #$00 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_state,x jmp j3D0C b3C79 lda #$00 ; x-ref: $3c6f jsr s3EFA lda #$02 sta tbl_enemy_car_state,x lda #$01 sta $d028,x ; Sprite 1 Color lda tbl_enemy_car_type,x tay lda tbl_points_sprite_frame,y jsr award_collision_score_and_damage_sprite lda #$10 sta f0930,x ldy #$00 b3C99 lda a0980,y ; x-ref: $3ca1 beq b3CA5 iny cpy #$03 bne b3C99 ldy #$00 b3CA5 lda #$e2 ; x-ref: $3c9c jsr s3CCD lda #$10 sta f0983,y jmp j3D0C .byte $0c, $3d, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 check_sprite_offscreen lda $d002,x ; x-ref: $3c19; Sprite 1 X Pos cmp #$ff beq b3CC8 rts b3CC8 pla ; x-ref: $3cc5 pla jmp b3C64 s3CCD sta a07FD,y ; x-ref: $3ca7 lda #$01 sta a0980,y tya pha asl a tay txa pha asl a tax lda $d002,x ; Sprite 1 X Pos sta $d00a,y ; Sprite 5 X Pos lda $d003,x ; Sprite 1 Y Pos sta $d00b,y ; Sprite 5 Y Pos pla tax pla tay rts brk brk j3CF0 lda #$01 ; x-ref: $1795 sta $d02c ; Sprite 5 Color sta $d02d ; Sprite 6 Color sta $d02e ; Sprite 7 Color rts .byte $00, $00, $00, $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Moves up to 4 active sprites diagonally each frame (collision debris/sparks ; spawned when cars collide). For each active slot, reads direction and step ; count, then moves the sprite one pixel at a time in the given direction. ; ; Direction codes (sprite_direction): ; 1 → up-left (dec X, dec Y) ; 2 → up-right (inc X, dec Y) ; 3 → down-left (dec X, inc Y) ; 4 → down-right (inc X, inc Y) [default] ; ; Each pixel step calls check_road_collision; if the tile under the sprite is ; not a passable road tile ($20/$65), the collision handler fires: triggers ; hit animation (white sprite, new frame), then deactivates the slot. ; After all steps, decrements sprite_lifetime; reaching zero deactivates ; the slot (sprite_active and sprite_state both cleared). ; ; Inputs: sprite_active[0..3], sprite_state[0..3], ; sprite_direction[0..3], sprite_step_count[0..3], ; sprite_lifetime[0..3]; VIC-II sprite X/Y regs ; Outputs: VIC-II sprite X/Y regs ($D002-$D009) ; Side Effects: Deactivates slots on lifetime expiry or road collision; ; triggers hit animation on collision (color, shape change) ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- update_moving_sprites ldx #$00 ; x-ref: $183e b3D02 lda tbl_enemy_sprite_active,x ; Skip slot if both sprite_active and sprite_state are 0 (inactive) ; x-ref: $3d0f bne b3D12 lda tbl_enemy_sprite_state,x ; Also skip if sprite_state is 0 bne b3D12 j3D0C inx ; x-ref: $3c76, $3caf, $3d44, $3d4f cpx #$04 ; 4 sprite slots (0..3) bne b3D02 rts b3D12 lda tbl_enemy_sprite_direction,x ; x-ref: $3d05, $3d0a cmp #$01 ; Direction 1 = up-left beq b3D52 cmp #$02 ; Direction 2 = up-right beq b3D6E cmp #$03 beq b3D8A ; Direction 3 = down-left; else direction 4 = down-right lda tbl_enemy_sprite_step_count,x tay ; Y = step count (pixels to move this frame) txa pha asl a ; X = slot_index * 2 (VIC-II sprite reg offset) tax j3D29 cpy #$00 ; x-ref: $3d3a beq b3D3D jsr check_road_collision ; Collision check; exits loop early if hits non-road tile inc $d002,x ; Move sprite right (inc X); Sprite 1 X Pos inc $d003,x ; Move sprite down (inc Y); Sprite 1 Y Pos nop nop nop dey jmp j3D29 b3D3D pla ; x-ref: $3d2b, $3d5c, $3d78, $3d94 tax dec tbl_enemy_sprite_lifetime,x ; Decrement lifetime counter beq b3D47 ; Lifetime expired: deactivate slot jmp j3D0C b3D47 lda #$00 ; x-ref: $3d42 sta tbl_enemy_sprite_active,x sta tbl_enemy_sprite_state,x jmp j3D0C b3D52 lda tbl_enemy_sprite_step_count,x ; x-ref: $3d17 tay txa pha asl a tax j3D5A cpy #$00 ; x-ref: $3d6b beq b3D3D jsr check_road_collision dec $d002,x ; Move sprite left (dec X) — direction 1; Sprite 1 X Pos dec $d003,x ; Move sprite up (dec Y) — direction 1; Sprite 1 Y Pos nop nop nop dey jmp j3D5A b3D6E lda tbl_enemy_sprite_step_count,x ; x-ref: $3d1b tay txa pha asl a tax j3D76 cpy #$00 ; x-ref: $3d87 beq b3D3D jsr check_road_collision inc $d002,x ; Move sprite right (inc X) — direction 2; Sprite 1 X Pos dec $d003,x ; Move sprite up (dec Y) — direction 2; Sprite 1 Y Pos nop nop nop dey jmp j3D76 b3D8A lda tbl_enemy_sprite_step_count,x ; x-ref: $3d1f tay txa pha asl a tax j3D92 cpy #$00 ; x-ref: $3da3 beq b3D3D jsr check_road_collision dec $d002,x ; Move sprite left (dec X) — direction 3; Sprite 1 X Pos inc $d003,x ; Move sprite down (inc Y) — direction 3; Sprite 1 Y Pos nop nop nop dey jmp j3D92 .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 .byte $00, $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Per-frame player horizontal recoil. Called every frame from the main loop ; while a collision is active (col_active != 0). Slides the player sprite X ; by col_step_px pixels in the direction of the hit, for col_frames_left frames. ; ; col_quadrant 1 or 3 (NPC was LEFT of player): ; dec $D000 col_step_px times; calls apply_collision_recoil (Y nudge) each step ; col_quadrant 2 or 4 (NPC was RIGHT of player): ; inc $D000 col_step_px times; no Y nudge (3x NOP — possible bug) ; ; Decrements col_frames_left each call; when it reaches zero, clears col_active ; to end the effect. ; ; Inputs: col_active, col_quadrant, col_step_px, col_frames_left ; Outputs: $D000 (Sprite 0 X Pos) ; Side Effects: Calls apply_collision_recoil for left-side hits; clears ; col_active when col_frames_left expires ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- apply_player_x_recoil lda col_active ; Skip if no collision in progress ; x-ref: $4ecd bne b3DB6 rts b3DB6 lda col_quadrant ; x-ref: $3db3 cmp #$01 ; Dirs 1 & 3 = NPC was to LEFT → push player left beq b3DDE cmp #$03 beq b3DDE ldy col_step_px ; Pixels to move this frame j3DC4 cpy #$00 ; x-ref: $3dcf beq b3DD2 inc $d000 ; Push player right (NPC was right of player); Sprite 0 X Pos nop ; NOPs where apply_collision_recoil call is missing (possible bug) nop nop dey jmp j3DC4 b3DD2 dec col_frames_left ; Decrement frame counter ; x-ref: $3dc6 beq b3DD8 ; Frames remaining — come back next frame rts b3DD8 lda #$00 ; x-ref: $3dd5 sta col_active ; Collision effect complete — deactivate rts b3DDE ldy col_step_px ; x-ref: $3dbb, $3dbf j3DE1 cpy #$00 ; x-ref: $3dec beq b3DEF dec $d000 ; Push player left (NPC was left of player); Sprite 0 X Pos jsr apply_collision_recoil ; Y nudge toward collision (only applied for left-side hits) dey jmp j3DE1 b3DEF dec col_frames_left ; Decrement frame counter ; x-ref: $3de3 beq b3DF5 ; Frames remaining — come back next frame rts b3DF5 lda #$00 ; x-ref: $3df2 sta col_active ; Collision effect complete — deactivate rts .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Applies speed and score adjustments upon bumping into a car. ; This block is jumped to from the collision detection loop. Based on the angle ; of impact ($0988) and the car type, it either slows the player down (subtracting ; speed and score penalties) or speeds the player up (adding speed and score bonuses). ; ; Inputs: $0988 (collision angle), X (enemy index), Y (amount modifier) ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies player speed ($0804) and score digits ($08E0). Returns via JMP back to collision loop. ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- apply_collision_speed_score lda tbl_enemy_car_type,x ; x-ref: $3c12 tay lda f3F79,y tay lda col_quadrant cmp #$01 beq b3E42 cmp #$02 beq b3E42 b3E13 lda player_speed ; x-ref: $3e3d cmp #$14 beq b3E3F sec sbc #$01 sta player_speed tya pha ldy #$02 j3E24 lda a08E0,y ; x-ref: $3e37 sec sbc #$01 sta a08E0,y cmp #$ff bne b3E3A lda #$09 sta a08E0,y dey jmp j3E24 b3E3A pla ; x-ref: $3e2f tay dey bne b3E13 b3E3F jmp j3B0E ; x-ref: $3e18 b3E42 lda player_speed ; x-ref: $3e0d, $3e11, $3e6c cmp #$dc beq b3E6E clc adc #$01 sta player_speed tya pha ldy #$02 j3E53 lda a08E0,y ; x-ref: $3e66 clc adc #$01 sta a08E0,y cmp #$0a bne b3E69 lda #$00 sta a08E0,y dey jmp j3E53 b3E69 pla ; x-ref: $3e5e tay dey bne b3E42 b3E6E jmp j3B0E ; x-ref: $3e47 reset_voice1_state lda #$00 ; x-ref: $3e7d, $3ed1, $3f81, $51be jsr silence_voice1_or_bail_if_jumping sta $d405 ; Voice 1: Attack / Decay Cycle Control sta $d406 ; Voice 1: Sustain / Release Cycle Control rts j3E7D jsr reset_voice1_state ; x-ref: $3ece lda #$0f sta $d406 ; Voice 1: Sustain / Release Cycle Control lda #$6b sta $d405 ; Voice 1: Attack / Decay Cycle Control lda #$1e sta $d401 ; Voice 1: Frequency Control - High-Byte lda #$8c sta $d400 ; Voice 1: Frequency Control - Low-Byte lda #$81 sta $d404 ; Voice 1: Control Register rts .byte $00, $00, $00, $00, $00, $00 ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- ; Applies visual recoil to the player's car after a collision. ; Based on the collision angle ($0988), it shifts the player sprite (Sprite 0) ; either up or down on the screen to simulate a physical bump. ; It clamps the player's vertical position between $90 and $D0 to keep them ; within the visible gameplay area. ; ; Inputs: $0988 (collision angle) ; Outputs: None ; Side Effects: Modifies Sprite 0 Y Pos ($D001). ; =-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=- apply_collision_recoil lda col_quadrant ; x-ref: $3de8 cmp #$01 beq b3EBB cmp #$02 beq b3EBB inc $d001 ; Sprite 0 Y Pos lda $d001 ; Sprite 0 Y Pos cmp #$d0 bcc b3EBA lda #$d0 sta $d001 ; Sprite 0 Y Pos b3EBA rts ; x-ref: $3eb3 b3EBB dec $d001 ; x-ref: $3ea5, $3ea9; Sprite 0 Y Pos lda $d001 ; Sprite 0 Y Pos cmp #$90 bcs b3ECA lda #$90 sta $d001 ; Sprite 0 Y Pos b3ECA rts ; x-ref: $3ec3 s3ECB sta sprite_ptr_0 ; x-ref: $4826 jmp j3E7D ; Plays crash SFX on SID Voice 1 (Noise, Freq=$0112, A=1/D=8) play_crash_sfx jsr reset_voice1_state ; x-ref: $3ef7, $5233 lda #$00 sta $d406 ; Voice 1: Sustain / Release Cycle Control lda #$18 sta $d405 ; Voice 1: Attack / Decay Cycle Control lda #$01 sta $d401 ; Voice 1: Frequency Control - High-Byte lda #$12 sta $d400 ; Voice 1: Frequency Control - Low-Byte lda #$81 sta $d404 ; Voice 1: Control Register rts s3EEE sta tbl_enemy_car_state,x ; x-ref: $45b9 jmp j3F81 set_col_y_dir_play_sfx sta collision_rel_y ; x-ref: $3b76 jmp play_crash_sfx s3EFA sta tbl_enemy_sprite_active,x ; x-ref: $3c7b jmp j3F81 tbl_sprite_color .byte $01, $01, $04, $07, $0e, $0e, $05, $0d ; x-ref: $4b19 .byte $66, $66, $44, $7c, $9c, $64, $64, $64 .byte $e5, $e5, $64, $fa, $dc, $e4, $e4, $e4 tbl_points_sprite_frame .byte $e3, $e3, $e4, $e4, $e4, $e5, $e5, $e5 ; x-ref: $3c8c, $45c5, $47a4, $47dd tbl_sprite_step_count_0 .byte $03, $03, $01, $03, $03, $04, $04, $05 ; x-ref: $3a77, $3a9b .byte $03, $03, $01, $03, $03, $04, $04, $05 .byte $07, $07, $02, $07, $07, $08, $08, $09 .byte $03, $03, $01, $03, $03, $04, $04, $05 .byte $03, $03, $01, $03, $03, $04, $04, $05 .byte $02, $02, $01, $02, $02, $03, $03, $05 .byte $02, $02, $01, $02, $02, $03, $03, $05 .byte $01, $01, $01, $01, $01, $02, $02, $03 f3F60 .byte $05, $05, $07, $05, $05, $04, $04, $02 ; x-ref: $3bcd tbl_sprite_step_count_1 .byte $03, $03, $01, $03, $03, $04, $04, $04 ; x-ref: $3bc7 f3F70 .byte $05, $05, $07, $05, $05, $05, $05, $04 ; x-ref: $3bd3 a3F78 .byte $06 ; x-ref: $3bf3, $3bff f3F79 .byte $06, $06, $0a, $06, $06, $04, $04, $02 ; x-ref: $3e04 j3F81 jsr reset_voice1_state ; x-ref: $3ef1, $3efd lda #$00 sta $d406 ; Voice 1: Sustain / Release Cycle Control lda #$19 sta $d405 ; Voice 1: Attack / Decay Cycle Control lda #$01 sta $d401 ; Voice 1: Frequency Control - High-Byte lda #$12 sta $d400 ; Voice 1: Frequency Control - Low-Byte lda #$81 sta $d404 ; Voice 1: Control Register rts play_click_sfx lda #$00 ; x-ref: $3fbe, $3fc4 sta $d404 ; Voice 1: Control Register sta $d405 ; Voice 1: Attack / Decay Cycle Control sta $d406 ; Voice 1: Sustain / Release Cycle Control lda #$09 sta $d405 ; Voice 1: Attack / Decay Cycle Control lda #$44 sta $d401 ; Voice 1: Frequency Control - High-Byte lda #$95 sta $d400 ; Voice 1: Frequency Control - Low-Byte lda #$21 sta $d404 ; Voice 1: Control Register rts highscore_fire_pressed jsr play_click_sfx ; x-ref: $1df8 jmp handle_screen_hotspots sid_tick_sfx_and_get_ones jsr play_click_sfx ; x-ref: $4973 lda lives_ones rts title_screen_menu lda #$30 ; x-ref: $115c sta p_tmp_hi lda #$00 sta level_nr_self_modifiying lda #$31 sta p_tmp_lo j3FD8 lda key_scan ; x-ref: $3ffd cmp #$df ; $DF = %11011111 (bit 5 clear) beq select_2_players cmp #$ef ; $EF = %11101111 (bit 4 clear) bne b3FFA select_1_player lda #$01 sta current_player_nr sta number_of_players jmp j118E select_2_players lda #$02 ; x-ref: $3fdc sta number_of_players lda #$01 sta current_player_nr jmp j118E b3FFA jsr handle_menu_selection_input ; x-ref: $3fe0 jmp j3FD8 ; tile map (?). ; Each level has $20 bytes, there are 32 levels: 1024 bytes in total level_tile_tbl .byte $01, $02, $02, $03, $03, $02, $06, $06 ; level 0 ; x-ref: $1309, $130d, $487b, $487f .byte $06, $06, $06, $07, $08, $02, $02, $03 .byte $03, $04, $05, $02, $02, $03, $03, $04 .byte $05, $02, $02, $03, $02, $06, $07, $08 .byte $02, $02, $03, $03, $03, $04, $05, $03 ; level 1 .byte $03, $02, $02, $02, $03, $03, $04, $09 .byte $09, $05, $03, $02, $02, $07, $08, $01 .byte $01, $02, $02, $03, $03, $03, $04, $05 .byte $02, $03, $03, $03, $04, $09, $05, $03 ; level 2 .byte $03, $03, $02, $02, $06, $06, $06, $02 .byte $02, $03, $03, $04, $05, $03, $02, $02 .byte $06, $07, $08, $06, $02, $03, $04, $05 .byte $01, $02, $02, $03, $03, $03, $02, $0a ; level 3 .byte $0c, $04, $05, $03, $02, $02, $02, $03 .byte $02, $0a, $0c, $04, $05, $03, $03, $02 .byte $03, $02, $02, $07, $0e, $08, $07, $08 .byte $01, $02, $02, $03, $03, $04, $09, $09 ; level 4 .byte $09, $05, $01, $01, $02, $0a, $0c, $02 .byte $02, $0d, $0c, $04, $05, $01, $01, $02 .byte $02, $03, $03, $07, $0e, $08, $07, $08 .byte $02, $02, $07, $08, $07, $08, $02, $02 ;
